title: SYNTHETIC FAR compliance with an OPTIONAL proposal (indeterminate determination)
description: SYNTHETIC fixture (M4-T003 rework): identical to demo-compliance-far EXCEPT proposed_floor_area_sq_ft is OPTIONAL. When the proposal is omitted the rule still computes the maximum floor-area limit, but the compliance determination is INDETERMINATE (null) - a limit without a genuine pass/fail. Proves the engine reports 'no determination' honestly rather than fabricating one. Illustrative value; not a Verified determination.

citations.quote: SYNTHETIC (not verbatim from any source): for M4-T003 engine-hardening demonstrations only - effective-date temporal selection and a compliance pass/fail determination. Illustrative values; never a legal statement.

inputs.name: zoning_district
inputs.description: District governing the lot (scope via applicability).

inputs.name: proposed_floor_area_sq_ft
inputs.description: OPTIONAL proposed residential floor area to test against the computed maximum; omitting it yields an indeterminate (null) determination.

outputs.name: max_floor_area_sq_ft
outputs.description: Maximum floor area = lot area x FAR.

steps.note: Maximum floor area = lot area x FAR.

determination.description: Proposed floor area must not exceed the computed maximum (indeterminate when the proposal is omitted).

limitations: SYNTHETIC compliance-determination demonstration; illustrative value; requires official capture + G6 before any use.
